name: recursive-animation-engine-tooling
description: Installs the Hyperframes CLI next to this repo so `reng` can render without a manual clone.

scripts.test: hyperframes --version && (command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'ffmpeg not on PATH' >&2; exit 1)) && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v
